---
title: Basketball Insights
format:
  html:
    theme: darkly
    self-contained: true
---

## Welcome to the Basketball Website

This site presents historical basketball game data analysis built with Quarto.

- [Game score analysis](scores.qmd)
- [Download the dataset](Games.csv)

## About

The project uses a Quarto website structure to make it easy to share interactive reports and visualizations.

## Publish

This website is configured for GitHub Pages deployment from the `_site/` output folder using GitHub Actions.
